words.meaning_en: A piece of clothing worn on the upper body
words.example_sentence: He wore a white shirt to school.

words.meaning_en: A piece of clothing covering both legs from waist to ankles
words.example_sentence: He ironed his trousers before the interview.

words.meaning_en: A piece of clothing worn by girls or women
words.example_sentence: She wore a pink dress to the party.

words.meaning_en: Footwear that covers and protects the foot
words.example_sentence: He polished his shoes before the match.

words.meaning_en: A soft flat hat without a brim
words.example_sentence: He wore a cap to protect himself from the sun.

words.meaning_en: A folding device used for protection from rain or sun
words.example_sentence: She opened her umbrella when it started to rain.

words.meaning_en: A warm knitted garment worn on the upper body
words.example_sentence: Grandma knitted a sweater for winter.

words.meaning_en: A set of standard clothes worn at school or work
words.example_sentence: All students must wear their school uniform.

words.meaning_en: A long piece of cloth worn as traditional dress by Indian women
words.example_sentence: My mother wore a silk saree to the wedding.

words.meaning_en: A long cloth wound around the head as a traditional headwear
words.example_sentence: He wore a colourful turban at the festival.

words.meaning_en: A large piece of cloth worn around the shoulders to keep warm
words.example_sentence: Grandmother wrapped a shawl around herself in winter.
He wore a warm jacket in winter.

words.meaning_en: Open footwear held on the foot with straps
words.example_sentence: She wore sandals to the beach.

words.meaning_en: A small disc sewn on clothing to fasten it
words.example_sentence: One button on his shirt was missing.

words.meaning_en: A strip of cloth worn around the neck or head
words.example_sentence: She tied a scarf around her neck in the cold.
